news_title: Nuwellis Receives New US Patent Reinforcing Vivian™ Pediatric Device Focused on Safer, More Precise Ultrafiltration
summary: Nuwellis (NASDAQ:NUWE)has secured U.S. Patent No. 12,415,021 for innovative hemolysis sensing technology in blood filtration systems. The patent, issued onSeptember 16, 2025, specifically supports their pediatric device Vivian and future platform developments.The technology enables detection of red blood cell destruction through hemolysis sensors placed at the circuit inlet and ultrafiltrate line, helping medical teams distinguish between external hemolysis and issues within the extracorporeal circuit. This advancement is particularly significant for improving the safety of ultrafiltration therapy and continuous renal replacement therapy (CRRT).
